CheckTitle: RDS instances should have disk encryption enabled
Description: Ensure that RDS instances have storage disk encryption enabled using a KMS key.
Risk: RDS instances without disk encryption store data at rest in plaintext, which may expose sensitive information if the underlying storage is compromised.

Code.Other:
1. Log on to the Huawei Cloud console
2. Navigate to Relational Database Service
3. Select the instance
4. Click More > Manage Disk Encryption
5. Enable disk encryption and select a KMS key

Recommendation.Text: Enable disk encryption on all RDS instances using a customer-managed KMS key.
